title: AI Generated Control Change
content:
# AI Generated Control Change

You can create quickly create control changes directly from the Kelvin AI prompt screen.

<iframe width="800" height="450" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/iLrRO81J7a0?si=AYL3XzGq8ThXcKf1" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Create Control Change

To start, click on the **Kelvin AI** menu item.

You will see the popup like this;

Then type in your request like;

```
change motor speed setpoint to 50rpm on PCP #01
```

You will then see a response showing you the current value and the value you want to set.

If you are satisfied, you can click confirm to initiate the control change.

    You can also change multiple assets at the same time by adapting the prompt to say "... from PCP #01 to #05".

    Like all LLM's you have flexibility how to phrase your prompt.
